steps.title: Recognize the pattern
steps.content: Every term in $4x + 6 = 12$ is even (divisible by 2). To find an equivalent equation, divide all terms by their common factor, 2.

steps.title: Divide through by 2
steps.content:
Dividing the entire equation by 2:
$$\frac{4x + 6}{2} = \frac{12}{2}$$
$$2x + 3 = 6$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
